caption: deshawn you still on for gaming thursday or is work eating you again
thursday's good. tuesday's the one that's shot, VPN certs expired on half of ironclad and nobody flagged it
classic. how many tickets
47 by lunch. West Hartford office practically DDoS'd my inbox
lol. marcus still got little league thursday tho right
yeah practice's at 6, so gaming's an after-9 thing for me
works. i'll queue up warzone, you bring the trash talk
always do 🎮
